overview.short: Magderu is an 8th-century temple of Maitraka period located near Dhrasanvel village in Okhamandal Taluka of Devbhoomi Dwarka district, Gujarat, India.
overview.description: Magderu is an 8th-century temple of Maitraka period located near Dhrasanvel village in Okhamandal Taluka of Devbhoomi Dwarka district, Gujarat, India. The temple is located three miles northeast of Dwarka.

topPlaces.name: Nageshwar Jyotirlinga
topPlaces.description: Nageshwar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva located on Dwarka, Gujarat, India. It is one of the legendary temples mentioned in the Shiva Purana and one of the twelve Jyotirlingas.

topPlaces.name: Dwarka
topPlaces.description: Dwarka () is a coastal town and municipality of Devbhumi Dwarka district in the Indian state of Gujarat. It is located on the western shore of the Okhamandal Peninsula on the right bank of the Gomti River at the mouth of the Gulf of Kutch facing the Arabian Sea.

items.note: Nageshwar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva located on Dwarka, Gujarat, India. It is one of the legendary temples mentioned in the Shiva Purana and one of the twelve Jyotirlingas.

Dwarka () is a coastal town and municipality of Devbhumi Dwarka district in the Indian state of Gujarat. It is located on the western shore of the Okhamandal Peninsula on the right bank of the Gomti River at the mouth of the Gulf of Kutch facing the Arabian Sea.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Magderu?
faq.a: The best time to visit Magderu is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

The nearest airport is Porbandar Airport (95 km) and the nearest railway station is Rajkot Junction (178 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Magderu?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Magderu at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Magderu?
faq.a: Stays in Magderu start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Magderu?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nageshwar Jyotirlinga, Dwarka.
